data.description:
## Why
Nothing currently checks the DIFF against its ticket. plan-review checks the plan; completion-verifier
checks at close; a diff-time scope check is complementary and catches scope drift in the change itself.

## What
New scope-intent overlay, content-triggered when >=1 ticket resolves from the commit's rebar-ticket:
trailer (reuses the content-trigger seam). Resolves the FULL ticket set via extract_ticket_refs
(verify_commit.py supports multiple ids: multiple trailer lines AND whitespace-separated tokens) and
checks whether the diff implements the ticket(s), only them, and touches named files — scoped against
the UNION of all referenced tickets so legitimate multi-ticket commits don't produce false scope
findings. ONLY this overlay sees ticket context; base + all other overlays stay ticket-blind
(neutrality). Reuses plan-review's scope-intent criterion vocabulary. Advisory.

## Scope
src/rebar/llm/reviewers/code-review-scope-intent.md, trigger wiring, ticket-context assembly from the
trailer; criteria_routing.json entry.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Overlay fires only when a ticket resolves from the trailer; scopes against the union of all refs.
- [ ] A multi-ticket commit naming all its tickets produces no false scope-drift finding (eval).
- [ ] Base and other overlays remain ticket-blind; overlay is advisory.
data.title: Scope-intent overlay (diff vs union of trailer tickets)
